text: 4198 - وَ رُوِيَ : "أَنَّ اَلْمُسُوخَ لَمْ تَبْقَ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فَإِنَّ هَذِهِ مُثِّلَ بِهَا فَنَهَى اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَنْ أَكْلِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4198 - And it has been narrated:
"The mutated creatures (al-masukh) did not remain alive for more than three days. These were transformed as a lesson, and Allah (swt), the Almighty and Majestic, forbade eating them."
